known_limitations: P1 now imports RW-ROVER-001 as an AI-assisted visual avatar with Blender-authored rover-v1 material slots, procedural embedded base-color maps, and UV proof; RW-CRATE-AI-001 remains a visual landmark.
Imported AI-assisted GLBs are not used as gameplay collision; generated-mesh collision remains unproven and intentionally excluded.

RW-ROVER-001 has procedural authoring texture maps embedded in the runtime GLB and runtime parent-transform feedback animation, but no skeletal rig, no source-baked photoreal PBR maps, and is not Unity-imported.
The deterministic QA path uses the prototype's local __prototypeGate API to avoid brittle pointer-lock automation.

asset_provenance.tool: OpenAI image reference, TRELLIS-image-large mesh-only export, Blender 5.1.1 cleanup/material/procedural texture/proxy export, Three.js GLTFLoader runtime import
asset_provenance.collision_strategy: visual avatar only; gameplay movement and collision use the procedural rover proxy
asset_provenance.known_limitations: Mesh generated from mesh-only TRELLIS output with Blender-authored material slots and procedural embedded base-color maps; runtime animation is parent-transform feedback only, no skeletal rig, no source-baked photoreal PBR maps, not Unity-imported.

asset_provenance.tool: TRELLIS-image-large mesh-only export; Three.js GLTFLoader runtime import
asset_provenance.collision_strategy: visual landmark only; no generated mesh collision
asset_provenance.known_limitations: Mesh-only, not textured/PBR, not Blender-cleaned, not Unity-imported, not the hero rover asset.

asset_provenance.collision_strategy: simple proxy box controlled by game state; visual fallback meshes are hidden after RW-ROVER-001 loads
asset_provenance.known_limitations: Gameplay proxy and GLB-load fallback only, not the promoted visual avatar; Unity and Blender import are not claimed for this procedural fallback.

asset_provenance.tool: Three.js boxes, cylinder, and torus primitives
asset_provenance.collision_strategy: deterministic QA state transitions for gate validation
asset_provenance.known_limitations: No external mesh, texture, or material generation was used.
